title: Site Tracking
siteToTrack: Which site would you like to track?
eventToTrack: Which events would you like to track?
scriptDescription: In order to start tracking your customers are interacting with your site, you must first implement the script below so visitors to your site can receive notifications.
scriptInstruction: Copy the following lines of code and paste them in the last line before "head" element
scriptPayAttention: * Pay attention, Site tracking will only work on sites with SSL certificate
addFeatureTooltip: Want to set up tracking on your site? Talk to our sales team today at 03-5240290!
